name: zvideo_pixel_pack_setup_from_masks
description: zVideo::PixelPack_SetupFromMasks initializes the RGB pixel-pack masks, bit counts, packed shifts, and 8-bit shifted masks from DirectDraw pixel-format channel widths.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 115 unmasked mismatches after masking 48 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 166 bytes and the VC object body is 176 bytes with 12 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The reviewed failure is register allocation and instruction scheduling drift in the inline shifted-mask expressions; the source body is leaf fastcall and has no visible direct callees, matching the Binary Ninja dependency frontier.
The native smoke verifies 5:6:5 RGB masks, bit counts, packed red/green/blue shift state, and shifted 8-bit masks written to the global zVideo pixel-pack state.
